text:
Bandit's Blade (盗賊の剣, Touzoku no Ken) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows the caster to summon a Bandit's Blade. A successful attack using this weapon, will randomly cast a "Mug", "Pickpocket", and "Thief" on the target. This card will have no effect on someone who is using "Fortress" or a Paladin's Necklace.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.094 :: 盗賊の剣 
この剣で攻撃が成功すると、攻撃した相手にランダムで「強奪」「掏摸」「窃盗」のいずれかの効果を与えることができる。ただし「堅牢」「聖騎士の首飾り」の使用者には無効。
|-
![Eng]
|No.094 :: Bandit's Blade 
An attack successful with this sword, will randomly cast "Mug", "Pickpocket", or "Thief" on the victim. However, not valid against "Fortress" or Paladin's Necklace.
|}
